subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! The bond of unity and concord, which was penned by one of the near-servants of the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان وثیقه اتحاد و اتفاق که بانشاء یکی از بندگان مقرب کبریا مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
